title: AI Assistant
description: Answer common client questions on WhatsApp using your clinic knowledge base.

locked.title: Add-on not subscribed
locked.description: The WhatsApp AI assistant is an additional S/15/month service. Contact support or check your subscription to enable it.

active.title: Active service
active.knowledge_description: Soon you will be able to upload FAQs, hours and policies so the bot can reply automatically.

whatsapp_hint: Uses the same clinic WhatsApp number. It must be connected for the assistant to reply.
